scenario.name: OPTIONS with Session-ID
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:1234@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: Asterisk <sip:1234@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Session-ID: 00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Asterisk Testsuite Content-Length: 0
